ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., iron ore, coal) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per ton for the resource (in Yuan) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ton, barrel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "mining_location" TEXT /* Primary mining location of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the acquisition stage (e.g., coal transportation) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource associated with this stage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the acquisition stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the acquisition stage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the acquisition stage (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the stage is taking place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisition_stages_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the acquisition stage related to this cost */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for this acquisition stage */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., labor, equipment, transportation) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisition_costs_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES acquisition_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_stages" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the production stage */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource associated with this production stage */,
  "production_qty" REAL /* Quantity produced at this stage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production stage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production stage (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the stage is taking place */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the production stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_stages_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_costs" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total cost entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource for which the total cost is calculated */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred for the resource */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the total cost is calculated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the total cost */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_costs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., fossil fuels, metals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
